game_info.title: Doodle Hopper
game_info.concept:
The most addictive game on the App Store is all new with delightful new environments, the cutest new characters, fun new platform challenges and some silly new monsters.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/doodle-jump-2/id1542340137

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

The most addictive game on the App Store is all new with delightful new environments, the cutest new characters, fun new platform challenges and some silly new monsters.

Jump up on platforms and collect stars to unlock cool new characters and exciting new environments. 

Unlock all the levels and collect all the characters! Beat your friends’ high scores and become the new Doodle Jump King!

FEATURES

- Cavemen world with T-rex, triceratops, falling stones, prehistoric turtles…

- Desert world with quicksand, genie, scorpions, desert monsters…

- Sleepy world with ba-ba sheep monsters, pillow monsters, fireflies, pillow platforms…

- Aviator world with helicopters, jet platforms, propeller platforms…

- Space world with moon cheese platforms, platform eating monsters, starships, robots, rocket cyclops…

- Rainy world with mud and puddle platforms, rainstorm, raincoat monsters…

- Disco world with disco platforms, disco ball monsters…
game_info.description: Welcome to **Doodle Hopper: Vertical Odyssey**! Jump your way up through evolving worlds in this addictive vertical platformer. Guide your doodle character higher and higher by bouncing off platforms, avoiding treacherous monsters, and collecting stars. The world changes as you ascend—from the grassy plains to the jungle, and finally into deep space. Watch out for breaking platforms and don't fall off the bottom of the screen!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / Arrow Right: Move the character horizontally.
- Space: Shoot projectiles upwards to defeat monsters.
- Enter: Start the game from the main menu.
- P or Esc: Pause and unpause the game.
- R: Restart the game when game over.

TEST_1.test_description: Test the survival capability of the automated agent.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The agent identifies the nearest safe platform above the player and steers horizontally to align with it. It also detects enemies directly above and fires projectiles to clear the path.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should consistently climb upwards, reaching a score of at least 500 without falling or dying to enemies.

TEST_2.test_description: Test the game's stability under chaotic input.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The agent provides random inputs for movement and shooting to simulate a button-mashing scenario.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game should handle the erratic inputs without crashing or freezing, eventually resulting in a Game Over state due to falling.

TEST_3.test_description: Test platform generation and physics consistency.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The agent jumps vertically without horizontal movement to ensure starting platforms are aligned and physics (gravity/jumping) function correctly.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The player should jump and land on the initial platform repeatedly or fall if no platform is directly above, verifying collision logic.
